historical_parallel: The Persecution of Christians during the Roman Empire (303-313 AD)
era_resolution: Martyrdom and perseverance of early Christians, leading to the Edict of Milan in 313 AD, granting tolerance to Christianity
modern_resolution: Advanced prophetic insights and interfaith dialogue, leveraging technology for global unity and peace, such as online platforms for spiritual growth and conflict resolution

biblical_tie.context: Blessed are those who are persecuted because of righteousness, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

protocol: UESP Protocol: Implementing a harmonization framework, integrating historical resilience with modern technological advancements to foster a culture of peace, tolerance, and unity, inspired by the enduring legacy of Saint Agnes
